technical_correlations.explanation: Maintaining accuracy across a wide pressure range is critical; improvements in pressure range often require enhanced accuracy calibration.
Stable supply voltage supports robust output signals, especially for real-time digital data transmission.
Certifications often require specific process connection designs to ensure environmental resistance and mechanical robustness.

key_insights: Products with advanced digital output protocols (e.g., EJA110E) provide superior integration and monitoring capabilities, a key competitive advantage.
Certification and field calibration capabilities remain a gap across products, representing an opportunity for differentiation in harsh environment reliability and measurement confidence.
Wide pressure range and high accuracy are strongly correlated and critical for downhole applications; products excelling in both meet core customer needs effectively.

Rosemount 3051.pressure_range: 0 to 25 inH2O up to 0 to 10000 psi (varies by model)
Rosemount 3051.process_connection: 1/2-14 NPT female, G1/2 A DIN 16288 male, others

Cerabar PMP71B.pressure_range: 400 mbar to 700 bar (1.5 psi to 10,500 psi)

EJA110E.output_signal: 4-20 mA DC with HART, FOUNDATION Fieldbus, PROFIBUS PA, 1-5 V DC
EJA110E.supply_voltage: Varies by model, typically 10.5 to 42 VDC
